CustomField.description: Fully qualified Apex class implementing IF_Trigger.PostAction. Runs once after all trigger actions complete, for cross-object/transaction-level work (audit aggregation, async enqueue, telemetry). DML is not permitted inside a post-trigger action.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the Apex class name (with namespace prefix for managed-package classes). The class must implement IF_Trigger.PostAction. The action cannot perform DML.
CustomField.label: Apex Class Name
